title: High stakes battle in Bihpur as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Bihpur. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Bihpur
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Bihpur assembly segment.

title: Economic survey reports positive growth in Bihpur assembly segment
snippet_text: Local growth indicators and agricultural trade volumes in Bihpur show upward trends, becoming a talking point for local candidates.

title: Women voters of Bihpur demand better primary healthcare and clean water
snippet_text: A coalition of local self-help groups in Bihpur has presented a list of demands to major political parties emphasizing sanitational assets.

title: Independent candidates emerge as spoilers in Bihpur triangular contest
snippet_text: With rebel leaders refusing to withdraw their nominations in Bihpur, political analysts predict a tight multi-cornered fight.

title: Flood protection works in Bihpur inspected by state cabinet delegation
snippet_text: With local embankments requiring urgent reinforcements, the local flood relief work has become a major talking point in Bihpur.
